money_flow_summary: Money flows from students and employers through course platforms, universities, and corporate L&D budgets. AI has disrupted both content creation (courses generated in days) and delivery (personalized tutoring AI).

opportunities.title: AI Corporate Training Content Factory
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Takes company policy docs + SOPs, generates SCORM-compliant e-learning modules with quizzes and interactive scenarios. Companies pay $5k–$50k per course to instructional designers; your tool does it in 2 hours at $299–$999/mo.
opportunities.moat: Existing course library per company creates switching cost; LMS connector integrations
opportunities.first_step: Build PDF → SCORM module generator; create 3 demo courses; cold email 20 HR managers on LinkedIn
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI converts dry policy text into engaging scenarios with realistic workplace dialogue

competitors.name: Articulate 360
competitors.weakness: $1,400+/yr; requires trained instructional designer; manual creation; 40+ hours per course

competitors.name: iSpring
competitors.weakness: $970+/yr; PowerPoint-based; manual; no AI generation; same human labor requirements

competitors.name: EasyGenerator
competitors.weakness: $108–$300+/mo; minimal AI; still requires human to write all content

opportunities.gap: Every e-learning tool on the market is still a blank canvas that requires a human to create content. Zero tools take a policy document and produce a complete, engaging, assessment-ready course automatically. That's the gap.
poc_steps: Find any 5-page employee handbook or policy doc
Prompt Claude: 'create a 10-question quiz and 3 scenario-based exercises from this document'
Show 1 HR manager: 'I turned your 20-page onboarding guide into a complete course in 10 minutes'

opportunities.title: AI Career Coach for Tech Job Seekers
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Reviews resumes, rewrites for ATS, generates tailored cover letters per job, preps for interviews with role-specific practice questions, tracks application status. Charge $29–$99/mo.
opportunities.moat: User's resume + application history creates personalization; company interview database grows over time
opportunities.first_step: Build resume → tailored cover letter generator with Claude; add ATS scoring system; launch on Product Hunt
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI rewrites resume bullets with specific metrics for each target company's JD — what career coaches charge $300+ for

competitors.name: Teal
competitors.weakness: Free job tracker + basic resume tool; no AI cover letters; no interview prep; limited coaching

competitors.name: Rezi
competitors.weakness: Resume builder with ATS score; $29/mo; no cover letters, no interview prep, no coaching

competitors.name: Human career coaches
competitors.weakness: $200–$500/hr; not accessible to most job seekers; can't scale; appointment-based

opportunities.gap: Teal and Rezi are basic resume tools. A full-cycle career coach AI (resume → applications → cover letters → interview prep → offer negotiation) in one subscription at $29/mo vs $300+/hr human coaches is the gap.
poc_steps: Build a simple form: paste resume + paste job description
Output: tailored resume edits + custom cover letter
Charge $9 per cover letter or $29/mo subscription
